text.title: Retargeting / Remarketing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-pixel-events
step.action: Verify ViewContent, AddToCart, Purchase, Pricing-page-viewed events firing.
step.decision-gate: If <3 distinct events fire, STOP and complete pixel work first.

step.name: build-intent-ladder
step.action: Build the 5-tier audience ladder; size each ≥1000.

step.name: lock-spend-share
step.action: Allocate 20-30% of total spend to retargeting; rebalance weekly.
